modules/cache/config.m4
1dnl modules enabled in this directory by default
2
3dnl APACHE_MODULE(name, helptext[, objects[, structname[, default[, config]]]])
4
5APACHE_MODPATH_INIT(cache)
6
7APACHE_MODULE(file_cache, File cache, , , most)
8
9dnl #  list of object files for mod_cache
10cache_objs="dnl
11mod_cache.lo dnl
12cache_storage.lo dnl
13cache_util.lo dnl
14"
15cache_disk_objs="mod_cache_disk.lo"
16cache_socache_objs="mod_cache_socache.lo"
17
18case "$host" in
19  *os2*)
20    # OS/2 DLLs must resolve all symbols at build time
21    # and we need some from main cache module
22    cache_disk_objs="$cache_disk_objs mod_cache.la"
23    cache_socache_objs="$cache_socache_objs mod_cache.la"
24    ;;
25esac
26
27APACHE_MODULE(cache, dynamic file caching.  At least one storage management module (e.g. mod_cache_disk) is also necessary., $cache_objs, , most)
28APACHE_MODULE(cache_disk, disk caching module, $cache_disk_objs, , most, , cache)
29APACHE_MODULE(cache_socache, shared object caching module, $cache_socache_objs, , most)
30
31dnl
32dnl APACHE_CHECK_DISTCACHE
33dnl
34dnl Configure for the detected distcache installation, giving
35dnl preference to "--with-distcache=<path>" if it was specified.
36dnl
37AC_DEFUN([APACHE_CHECK_DISTCACHE],[
38if test "x$ap_distcache_configured" = "x"; then
39  dnl initialise the variables we use
40  ap_distcache_found=""
41  ap_distcache_base=""
42  ap_distcache_libs=""
43  ap_distcache_ldflags=""
44  ap_distcache_with=""
45
46  dnl Determine the distcache base directory, if any
47  AC_MSG_CHECKING([for user-provided distcache base])
48  AC_ARG_WITH(distcache, APACHE_HELP_STRING(--with-distcache=PATH, Distcache installation directory), [
49    dnl If --with-distcache specifies a directory, we use that directory or fail
50    if test "x$withval" != "xyes" -a "x$withval" != "x"; then
51      dnl This ensures $withval is actually a directory and that it is absolute
52      ap_distcache_with="yes"
53      ap_distcache_base="`cd $withval ; pwd`"
54    fi
55  ])
56  if test "x$ap_distcache_base" = "x"; then
57    AC_MSG_RESULT(none)
58  else
59    AC_MSG_RESULT($ap_distcache_base)
60  fi
61
62  dnl Run header and version checks
63  saved_CPPFLAGS="$CPPFLAGS"
64  saved_LIBS="$LIBS"
65  saved_LDFLAGS="$LDFLAGS"
66
67  if test "x$ap_distcache_base" != "x"; then
68    APR_ADDTO(CPPFLAGS, [-I$ap_distcache_base/include])
69    APR_ADDTO(MOD_INCLUDES, [-I$ap_distcache_base/include])
70    APR_ADDTO(LDFLAGS, [-L$ap_distcache_base/lib])
71    APR_ADDTO(ap_distcache_ldflags, [-L$ap_distcache_base/lib])
72    if test "x$ap_platform_runtime_link_flag" != "x"; then
73      APR_ADDTO(LDFLAGS, [$ap_platform_runtime_link_flag$ap_distcache_base/lib])
74      APR_ADDTO(ap_distcache_ldflags, [$ap_platform_runtime_link_flag$ap_distcache_base/lib])
75    fi
76  fi
77  dnl First check for mandatory headers
78  AC_CHECK_HEADERS([distcache/dc_client.h], [ap_distcache_found="yes"], [])
79  if test "$ap_distcache_found" = "yes"; then
80    dnl test for a good version
81    AC_MSG_CHECKING(for distcache version)
82    AC_TRY_COMPILE([#include <distcache/dc_client.h>],[
83#if DISTCACHE_CLIENT_API != 0x0001
84#error "distcache API version is unrecognised"
85#endif],
86      [],
87      [ap_distcache_found="no"])
88    AC_MSG_RESULT($ap_distcache_found)
89  fi
90  if test "$ap_distcache_found" != "yes"; then
91    if test "x$ap_distcache_with" = "x"; then
92      AC_MSG_WARN([...No distcache detected])
93    else
94      AC_MSG_ERROR([...No distcache detected])
95    fi
96  else
97    dnl Run library and function checks
98    AC_MSG_CHECKING(for distcache libraries)
99    ap_distcache_libs="-ldistcache -lnal"
100    APR_ADDTO(LIBS, [$ap_distcache_libs])
101
102    AC_TRY_LINK(
103      [#include <distcache/dc_client.h>],
104      [DC_CTX *foo = DC_CTX_new((const char *)0,0);],
105      [],
106      [ap_distcache_found="no"])
107    AC_MSG_RESULT($ap_distcache_found)
108    if test "$ap_distcache_found" != "yes"; then
109      if test "x$ap_distcache_base" = "x"; then
110        AC_MSG_WARN([... Error, distcache libraries were missing or unusable])
111      else
112        AC_MSG_ERROR([... Error, distcache libraries were missing or unusable])
113      fi
114    fi
115  fi
116
117  dnl restore
118  CPPFLAGS="$saved_CPPFLAGS"
119  LIBS="$saved_LIBS"
120  LDFLAGS="$saved_LDFLAGS"
121
122  dnl Adjust apache's configuration based on what we found above.
123  if test "$ap_distcache_found" = "yes"; then
124    APR_ADDTO(MOD_SOCACHE_DC_LDADD, [$ap_distcache_ldflags $ap_distcache_libs])
125    AC_DEFINE(HAVE_DISTCACHE, 1, [Define if distcache support is enabled])
126  else
127    enable_socache_dc=no
128  fi
129  ap_distcache_configured="yes"
130fi
131])
132
133APACHE_MODULE(socache_shmcb,  shmcb small object cache provider, , , most)
134APACHE_MODULE(socache_dbm, dbm small object cache provider, , , most)
135APACHE_MODULE(socache_memcache, memcache small object cache provider, , , most)
136APACHE_MODULE(socache_redis, redis small object cache provider, , , most)
137APACHE_MODULE(socache_dc, distcache small object cache provider, , , no, [
138    APACHE_CHECK_DISTCACHE
139])
140
141APR_ADDTO(INCLUDES, [-I\$(top_srcdir)/$modpath_current])
142
143APACHE_MODPATH_FINISH
